final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: interior lifestyle photo, landscape crop
Primary request: French romantic bedroom scene with a four-poster bed draped in sheer canopy curtains, antique vanity, soft morning light, and rose petals scattered across the floor and bedding
Scene/backdrop: Parisian apartment bedroom, tall windows revealing a soft-focus Paris street view outside — wrought-iron balcony railing, Haussmann-style facades, morning mist
Subject: ornate four-poster bed with flowing ivory chiffon canopy, aged gilded vanity with oval mirror and perfume bottles, scattered fresh rose petals in blush and deep red
Style/medium: photorealistic editorial interior photography, soft film aesthetic
Composition/framing: wide-angle interior shot, slightly elevated eye-level, 24mm lens, generous depth of field drawing from bed to window
Lighting/mood: gentle diffused morning sunlight streaming through sheer linen curtains, warm golden-hour glow, hazy and intimate — elegant yet languid
Color palette: ivory, blush pink, dusty rose, aged gold, soft cream, muted sage
Materials/textures: flowing chiffon canopy fabric, carved gilded wood bedframe, worn velvet upholstery, polished parquet floor, aged mirror with patina
Constraints: no people in frame; keep the atmosphere dreamy and unhurried; window light must be soft and non-harsh
Avoid: harsh shadows, modern furniture, oversaturated colors, cluttered composition
